name: concurrent-cl-gate rejection includes the holding session_id so operators can locate the conflicting CL per §2.23 + W-10
command: mkdir -p sessions && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"cl-200","phases":["E"],"branch":"feat/x"}' > sessions/cl-200.json && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"cl-201","phases":["E"],"branch":"feat/y"}' > cand.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/concurrent-cl-gate.sh" --sessions-dir sessions --candidate cand.json --allow-concurrent 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'holding_session=cl-200' out.txt && echo identified 1>&2
